name: opentitan-otp-ctrl
description: The OpenTitan OTP Controller (otp_ctrl) is a hardware block responsible for managing the One-Time Programmable (OTP) memory, including secure key storage, lifecycle state management, and key scrambling for secure operations.

interfaces.description: Device ID interface for OTP memory.
Manufacturing state interface for OTP memory.
Key manager interface for OTP key management.
Lifecycle control data interface for OTP memory.

parameters.name: DeviceIdWidth
parameters.description: Width of the device ID in bits.

parameters.name: ManufStateWidth
parameters.description: Width of the manufacturing state in bits.

parameters.name: ScrmblKeyWidth
parameters.description: Width of the scrambling key in bits.

parameters.name: ScrmblBlockWidth
parameters.description: Width of the scrambling block in bits.

parameters.name: NvmKeySeedWidth
parameters.description: Width of the non-volatile memory key seed in bits.

parameters.name: SramKeySeedWidth
parameters.description: Width of the SRAM key seed in bits.

parameters.name: KeyMgrKeyWidth
parameters.description: Width of the key manager key in bits.

parameters.name: NvmKeyWidth
parameters.description: Width of the non-volatile memory key in bits.

parameters.name: SramKeyWidth
parameters.description: Width of the SRAM key in bits.

parameters.name: SramNonceWidth
parameters.description: Width of the SRAM nonce in bits.

parameters.name: OtbnKeyWidth
parameters.description: Width of the OTBN key in bits.

parameters.name: OtbnNonceWidth
parameters.description: Width of the OTBN nonce in bits.

dependencies.name: lc_ctrl_state_pkg
dependencies.description: Lifecycle control state package for OTP lifecycle management.

dependencies.name: lc_ctrl_pkg
dependencies.description: Lifecycle control package for OTP lifecycle management.
